nasb.text: The descendants of the Kenite, Moses’ father-in-law, went up from the city of palms with the sons of Judah, to the wilderness of Judah which is in the south of Arad; and they went and lived with the people.

esv.text: And the descendants of the Kenite, Moses’ father-in-law, went up with the people of Judah from the city of palms into the wilderness of Judah, which lies in the Negeb near Arad, and they went and settled with the people.

cnv.text: 摩西岳父的子孫基尼人，和猶大人一同離開棕樹城，上到亞拉得以南的猶大曠野去，住在那裡的人民中。

ccb.text: 摩西岳父的后代基尼人和犹大人一同离开棕树城，到犹大南部旷野的亚拉得附近，跟当地人一起居住。
